## PRE-CUT KINESIOTAPE PATCHES ESPECIALLY DESIGNED FOR FACIAL SKIN.

The application of our skin tapes increase blood circulation, stimulate lymphatic drainage and support the muscles. The additional supply of oxygen and nutrients boosts the production of collagen and elastin, lifts and tones skin, reduces fine lines and wrinkles, and stimulates important detoxification processes.
